description_long: This is a dark wooden picket fence composed of several distinct sections, including a main fence panel, two upright posts, and a hinged gate. The pickets are vertically aligned with pointed tops, giving the fence a classic, secure appearance suitable for residential or park environments. The horizontal rails connect the pickets and provide structural support, while the posts at either end anchor the fence. The gate section features diagonal bracing for added stability and a simple, functional design. The wood appears weathered, with a matte finish and visible grain texture, suggesting durability and outdoor use. The overall construction is robust, with no visible decorative embellishments beyond the pointed picket tops.
description: A dark wooden picket fence with pointed tops, horizontal rails, and a matching gate section. The design is sturdy, functional, and well-suited for urban or residential boundaries.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full fence panel, two posts, and the gate section with all pickets and rails visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the fence, emphasizing the narrowness of the pickets and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view with the gate on the left, the main fence panel in the center, and posts on either side, mirroring the front but with the gate bracing visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the fence and posts.
